name: Creepy Camping
short_description: Indie Horror. The main character arrives in the forest in a Motorhome. The forest is covered with secrets and mysteries. Exploring the forest, over time, the campsite turns into a real nightmare. The hero understands that he is not alone in the forest...
detailed_description:
Indie Horror. The main character arrives in the forest in a Motorhome. The forest is covered with secrets and mysteries. Exploring the forest, over time, the campsite turns into a real nightmare. The hero understands that he is not alone in the forest...

Search for firewood for a fire, abandoned places. And a dangerous monster. All this awaits you in this game.

.

The game is well optimized, BUT not for weak computers

The main features of the game:

  • Elaborate screamers and monster

    • Elaborate linear locations

      • Atmospheric music and sounds

        • Elaborate events in the game
